overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The player navigates through heavy urban traffic, passing under overpasses and elevated highways with vibrant holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture. The scene transitions from open sunlit highways to covered neon-lit infrastructure and busy intersections.

events.description: passes from shadow of building into sunlit open highway section
briefly enters green-tinted road section under elevated infrastructure

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at moderate speed through urban highway, weaving between lanes and passing under concrete overpasses

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery truck driving in adjacent lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road ahead
multi-story building with distinctive teal-colored facade and balconies
large holographic advertisement display mounted on building
tall palm tree visible against the skyline near the highway
large corporate signage for Orbital Air company on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride through a sunlit urban highway. The rider passes under massive concrete overpasses while the teal office building dominates the right side. Palm trees and corporate billboards line the route as the motorcycle navigates through sparse traffic, transitioning from shadowed areas under infrastructure into bright morning sunlight.

events.description: approaches red traffic light and comes to complete stop behind dark sedan
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicles
traffic light turns green and motorcycle accelerates through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light behind a sedan, then accelerates through the intersection when the light changes

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the crosswalk while traffic is stopped

entered.detail: bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the road surface
vertical traffic signal showing red light initially then changing to green
steam rising from street vent adding atmospheric effect to the intersection

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle approaches a busy urban intersection marked by yellow crosswalk lines. After stopping at a red light behind a dark sedan, pedestrians cross in front while steam rises from a street vent. When the signal changes to green, the rider accelerates through the intersection, leaving the overpass structure behind and entering a denser urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with heavy traffic

events.description: weaves right to pass slower moving vehicles in traffic
approaches and enters elevated highway ramp with covered structure ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic, weaving between sedans and trucks while maintaining speed through commercial district

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead, occasionally braking and changing lanes

entered.detail: curved on-ramp leading up to elevated highway structure with concrete barriers
large digital advertisement featuring a person's face on building side
structural support beams illuminated with red neon lighting under the highway

segments.scene_description: Riding through a dense commercial district, the motorcycle weaves through moderate traffic including sedans and trucks. The street is lined with glass skyscrapers and digital billboards. As the segment progresses, the rider approaches an elevated highway entrance marked by distinctive red neon structural beams, transitioning from surface streets to the highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with neon lighting

events.description: enters covered highway section where red neon lights illuminate the interior structure
exits the covered neon-lit highway back into open sky and natural lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the covered highway section, following traffic flow under the red-lit structure

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving ahead through the covered section, maintaining distance

entered.detail: enclosed elevated roadway with metal truss ceiling and side barriers
structural ceiling beams glowing with bright red neon lighting creating cyberpunk atmosphere
floating digital advertisement visible through the side opening of the covered highway

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a striking covered highway section where the interior is bathed in red neon light from structural trusses overhead. Driving through this cyberpunk corridor, the rider passes under glowing beams and digital advertisements mounted on the ceiling. After several seconds in the enclosed space, the highway opens back up to natural daylight, revealing the exit ramp and surrounding towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial avenue with bus terminals

events.description: passes bus stop terminal with covered shelter on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising through the final commercial stretch, passing bus stops and navigating gentle curves in the road

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical tower wrapped with circular neon lighting and advertisements
covered bus shelter with bench and digital signage for public transit
building featuring traditional pagoda-style roof mixed with modern cyberpunk elements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered highway, the motorcycle enters a dense commercial avenue dominated by a distinctive circular neon tower in the distance. The rider passes a bus stop terminal on the right and buildings featuring a mix of traditional Asian architectural elements with futuristic neon facades. The street remains busy with moderate vehicle traffic as the journey continues through the heart of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from a sunlit highway under concrete overpasses into a dense, neon-accented urban canyon. It begins by gliding past palm trees and a dominant teal office building, moving through alternating patches of deep shadow and bright morning light. As the rider approaches a busy intersection, the camera pauses behind a dark sedan amidst rising street steam before accelerating forward through yellow crosswalks and away from the overpass structures. The scene then shifts into a crowded commercial district, weaving through traffic between glass skyscrapers and digital billboards. Finally, the path leads toward an elevated highway entrance, where the environment transforms as the rider passes under distinctive red neon structural beams.

The shot follows a continuous ride from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched tunnel into the sprawling, daylight brightness of a dense commercial district. It begins as the motorcycle enters a covered highway section, where the environment is bathed in deep red neon light emanating from structural trusses and ceiling-mounted digital advertisements. As the rider pushes forward through this cyberpunk corridor, the enclosed space suddenly opens back up to natural daylight, revealing an exit ramp framed by towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts into a busy commercial avenue, passing a bus stop terminal and buildings that blend traditional Asian architecture with futuristic neon facades. Finally, the camera glides through moderate vehicle traffic, heading toward a distinctive circular neon tower that dominates the distant city skyline.
